5.description: This Figure Depicts a Taxonomy for Crypto-Related Cybercrimes, Including Several Types of Blackmail, Hacks, and Frauds Source. Compiled from chainabuse.com in January 2024. Notes. Node size is based on the percentage of total reports in that category. Node color captures both group and intensity (largest node by reports within that category).
